product_description: Formative is an AI-powered instructional and assessment platform that enables educators to create interactive lessons, assign real-time assessments, and monitor student progress instantly. It supports diverse question types and multimedia content, providing teachers with immediate insights to differentiate instruction and track mastery.

acr_reports.title: Newsela, Inc. – Accessibility Conformance Report WCAG and Revised Section 508 Edition (Based on VPAT® Version 2.5Rev)
